data.name: ACCOUNT_CONFIRMATION
data.value: Account verification

data.name: ACCOUNT_CONFIRMED_SUCCESS
data.value: Account confirmed successfully

data.name: DUPLICATE_EMAIL
data.value: Email already exists

data.name: DUPLICATE_PHONE
data.value: Phone number already exists

data.name: INVALID_LOGIN
data.value: Invalid email or password

data.name: PASSWORD_CHANGED
data.value: Password changed successfully

data.name: DATA_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Data not found

data.name: IDENTITY_ERROR
data.value: An error occurred in the Identity system

data.name: ADDRESS_SAVED
data.value: Address saved successfully

data.name: ORDER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Sorry, this order was not found

data.name: USER_ORDERS_NOT_FOUND
data.value: No orders found for this user

data.name: ORDER_SUCCESS
data.value: Your order has been created successfully

data.name: ORDER_STATUS_SUCCESS
data.value: Order status updated successfully

data.name: DELIVERY_ASSIGN_SUCCESS
data.value: Delivery person assigned successfully

data.name: WAITER_ASSIGN_SUCCESS
data.value: Waiter assigned successfully

data.name: ORDER_ERROR
data.value: There was a problem processing your order

data.name: ORDER_STATUS_ERROR
data.value: Order status could not be updated

data.name: REQUIRED_FIELD
data.value: This field is required

data.name: INVALID_STATUS
data.value: Invalid order status

data.name: FORBIDDEN_ACCESS
data.value: You do not have permission to access this order

data.name: IDENTICAL_PHONE_ERROR
data.value: Entered phone numbers cannot be identical

data.name: PROFILE_UPDATE_FAILED
data.value: Failed to update profile information

data.name: NO_FILE_UPLOADED
data.value: No file selected for upload

data.name: ADDRESS_ADD_FAILED
data.value: An error occurred while adding the new address

data.name: ADDRESS_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Sorry, this address is not registered in our system

data.name: ADDRESS_UPDATE_FAILED
data.value: An error occurred while updating address information

data.name: ADDRESS_DELETE_FAILED
data.value: An error occurred while trying to delete the address

data.name: USER_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested user was not found

data.name: USER_ROLE_UPDATED
data.value: User permissions updated successfully

data.name: USER_DELETED_SUCCESS
data.value: User account deleted successfully

data.name: PASSWORD_ADD_FAILED
data.value: Failed to add the new password

data.name: HAS_PASSWORD_ERROR
data.value: This user already has a registered password, please use the change password feature

data.name: ACCOUNT_CREATE_FAILED
data.value: An error occurred while creating the new account

data.name: PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Sorry, this product is currently unavailable

data.name: PRODUCT_UPDATE_FAILED
data.value: Failed to update product information

data.name: CATEGORY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested category was not found

data.name: BRAND_NOT_FOUND
data.value: The requested brand was not found

data.name: PRODUCT_CREATE_FAILED
data.value: An error occurred while trying to add the new product

data.name: PRODUCT_DELETE_SUCCESS
data.value: Product deleted successfully from the system

data.name: PRODUCT_DELETE_FAILED
data.value: Could not delete the product, please try again

data.name: BASKET_ERROR
data.value: A problem occurred while processing your shopping basket

data.name: REVIEW_ADD_FAILED
data.value: Sorry, we encountered a problem adding your review

data.name: PAYMENT_INTENT_ERROR
data.value: An error occurred while setting up the payment process

data.name: ERROR_400
data.value: Bad Request

data.name: ERROR_401
data.value: Unauthorized

data.name: ERROR_403
data.value: Forbidden

data.name: ERROR_404
data.value: Not Found

data.name: ERROR_500
data.value: Internal Server Error

data.name: SETTINGS_UPDATE_FAILED
data.value: Failed to update system settings

data.name: SETTINGS_UPDATE_SUCCESS
data.value: Settings updated successfully

data.name: INVALID_FILE_TYPE
data.value: Invalid file type. Only JPG, PNG and WebP are allowed
